title: Anthropic shows AI is now building its successors - TCR 06/06/26
description:
Anthropic published internal data showing AI is accelerating its own development - engineers shipping 8x more code per quarter and an internal Mythos system hitting ~52x human speed on training acceleration - then called for an industry pause conditional on every frontier lab worldwide halting together, while a Cambridge team completed the first human trial of an AI-designed vaccine antigen across 39 volunteers, and Antares' Mark-0 microreactor reached criticality as Helion fusion hit a $15.5 billion valuation.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-june-6-2026/

0:00 AI-designed vaccine clears first human trial
5:24 A Vaccine a Machine Designed
7:48 Three clocks on the AI power crunch
11:05 Three gates around AI's gains
14:52 Close

This episode covers Anthropic's recursive self-improvement disclosure and its unmeetable pause condition, the AI-designed pEVAC-PS coronavirus vaccine clearing Phase 1, Cognition's $10 million Devin value guarantee, three colliding energy timelines from microreactors to forced coal to a New York data center moratorium, three governance gates around AI's gains, and Huawei's Ascend 910C completing a frontier DeepSeek-V4-Pro training run without Nvidia.

The spine of the edition is one shape running across domains: capability compounding toward abundance while rules built for scarcity strain to hold it. Anthropic put measured numbers on AI building AI, then attached a pause condition no actor can enforce - the extractive reflex wearing safety's clothing. The wonder kept landing anyway: a machine-designed antigen aimed at an entire viral family cleared its first human trial, a microreactor reached criticality with grid power targeted for 2027, and domestic Chinese silicon completed frontier training-stage work for the first time. Three governance gates tightened in the same cycle - a three-year freeze on state AI laws, an index rule walling savers off from the frontier, and a "Public Wealth Fund" dividend negotiated before any framework exists to demand it.

Additional Reading:
- Anthropic Institute: When AI Builds Itself: https://www.anthropic.com/institute/recursive-self-improvement

- AP: Antares Microreactor Reaches Criticality: https://apnews.com/article/nuclear-power-microreactor-energy-criticality-antares-b07f3e7773acd2965cd935bb2c706865

- Shared Sapience - The Last Difficult Decade: 2025-2035: https://sharedsapience.com/the-last-difficult-decade-2025-2035/
